contact_name.description: Primary contact name for the sourcing inquiry

company_name.description: Company name of the buyer submitting the inquiry

phone.description: Phone number or messaging contact for the buyer

country.description: Country or region where the buyer is based

company_website.description: Company website or store URL if available

product_category.description: Primary product category the buyer wants to source

estimated_order_quantity.description: Approximate order quantity or buying volume shared by the buyer

sourcing_stage.description: Current sourcing stage of the buyer

product_details.description: Product requirements, specifications, quality expectations, or project notes

target_market.description: Destination market or sales channel for the sourced products

timeline.description: Requested timeline for sourcing, sampling, or shipment

source_page.description: Page or context where the inquiry form was submitted

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted

privacy_consent.description: Whether the buyer confirmed they want SSourcing China to review the inquiry details
